title: Accessibility at Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Accessibility at Health Canada
Accessibility plans, progress reports, and how to provide feedback
Accessibility feedback form

## Services and information

### Accessibility plans and progress reports
Plans outline how Health Canada will eliminate barriers to accessibility, the reports detail our progress towards making Canada barrier-free by 2040.

### Ways to provide feedback
Ways to provide feedback about accessibility.

### Accessibility feedback process
Description of how we receive and respond to your feedback on accessibility.
Dental care, education, veterans, pension plan,
tax credits, deductions and more.
